name: toolbar
title: Toolbar
description: A W3C APG toolbar: a single-tab-stop row of grouped action buttons with roving tabindex and arrow-key navigation, including a toggle group and an overflow menu. Baseline is real <button>s in a role="toolbar"; toolbar.js layers the roving-tabindex arrow navigation and Home/End. A composed recipe — no custom element required to consume it.

cem.name: Toolbar
cem.description: Composed-API surface of the toolbar preset — a W3C APG roving-tabindex action toolbar. Describes the authoring surface (#668), never the internal toolbar.js wiring. Rides the #653 CEM protocol.

attributes.name: aria-label
attributes.description: Accessible name for the toolbar region.

slots.description: Toolbar items — action <button>s, toggle groups, and an overflow menu.

x-webeverything.note: A composition, not a registered custom element — the CEM coexists with the plain-markup recipe (#652 Fork 1 API-descriptor layer).
